title: BattleMaster
description:
role
In addition to your initial selection, you can also recruit new characters in your guild, each with its own unique strengths

* Soldiers have a strong endurance

* Mages can do a huge amount of spell damage

* The assassin is highly mobile, can do extremely high explosive damage, and can impose a variety of restrictions on the enemy

* Mercenary can continue to make remote output

* In addition to healing, the priest can strengthen friendly forces or weaken enemies

* Non-commissioned officers have powerful skills of great weightskills
In addition to the initial skills, each character can learn more powerful skills, and a variety of skills can be used in a variety of battlefield situationsequipment
Equipment is one of the main ways you enhance your character. Each character has several equipment fields that you can wear to gain attributes (some characters don't have off-hand equipment).

You can get equipment from stores and battles (depending on your current combat level)

You can also enhance existing equipment in the labProps 
You can retrieve items from the store and use them in battle to gain an advantage

Props are expendable and will disappear after use

After purchasing the item, remember to assign the item to the required character in the screenfight
Raise your combat level by fighting, so you can get more powerful equipment and challenge more powerful enemies

There are many tricks in combat, such as attacking the enemy from behind and doing more damage

Some monsters have elemental attributes, and elemental restraint can be used to deal with them more effectively, achieving twice the result with half the effort
description_short: BattleMaster is a traditional turn-based flag game that allows you to prepare for tough battles by equipage, reinforcement, skills, or recruiting new players
